Map_Title: Circle-Wise Distribution of Pedestrian Fatal Crashes
Key_Finding: Maximum pedestrian fatalities were reported in West, Outer and North-west regions of Delhi

Map_Title: Circle-Wise Distribution of Motorcyclist Fatal Crashes
Key_Finding: Vulnerability of two-wheeler victims is more in Burari, Bawana, Mangolpuri and Najafgarh circles. The total number of crashes of two wheelers are higher in Burari, Mangolpuri, Najafgarh, Dwarka and Kalyanpuri circles
Specific_Circles: Burari, Bawana, Mangolpuri, Najafgarh, Dwarka, Kalyanpuri

Map_Title: Circle-Wise Distribution of Cyclist Fatal Crashes
Key_Finding: Cyclists are more vulnerable in Nangloi, Kapashera, Kalkaji, and Mehrauli circles

Map_Title: Circle-Wise Distribution of Fatal Crashes Caused by HTVs
Key_Finding: Maximum fatal crashes caused by trucks occurred in Burari, Nangloi, Najafgarh, Delhi Cantt and Mangolpuri circles
Specific_Circles: Burari, Nangloi, Najafgarh, Delhi Cantt, Mangolpuri

Map_Title: Circle-Wise Distribution of Fatal Crashes Caused by Buses
Key_Finding: Maximum fatal crashes caused by buses occurred in Najafgarh, Kalyanpuri, Seemapuri, Mangolpuri, Tilak Nagar and Rajouri Garden circles
Specific_Circles: Najafgarh, Kalyanpuri, Seemapuri, Mangolpuri, Tilak Nagar, Rajouri Garden

Map_Title: Circle-Wise Distribution of Fatal Crashes Caused by Cars
Key_Finding: Maximum fatal crashes caused by cars occurred in Najafgarh, Bawana, Dwarka, Delhi Cantt and Mehrauli circles
Specific_Circles: Najafgarh, Bawana, Dwarka, Delhi Cantt, Mehrauli
